title: Detectives and Criminal Investigators
description: Conduct investigations related to suspected violations of federal, state, or local laws to prevent or solve crimes.

tasks.text: Check victims for signs of life, such as breathing and pulse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain facts or statements from complainants, witnesses, and accused persons and record interviews, using recording device.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Secure deceased body and obtain evidence from it, preventing bystanders from tampering with it prior to medical examiner's arrival.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record progress of investigation, maintain informational files on suspects, and submit reports to commanding officer or magistrate to authorize warrants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare reports that detail investigation findings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare charges or responses to charges, or information for court cases, according to formalized procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Preserve, process, and analyze items of evidence obtained from crime scenes and suspects, placing them in proper containers and destroying evidence no longer needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Obtain summary of incident from officer in charge at crime scene, taking care to avoid disturbing evidence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Note, mark, and photograph location of objects found, such as footprints, tire tracks, bullets and bloodstains, and take measurements of the scene.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine records and governmental agency files to find identifying data about suspects.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Secure persons at scene, keeping witnesses from conversing or leaving the scene before investigators arrive.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide information to lab personnel concerning the source of an item of evidence and tests to be performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze completed police reports to determine what additional information and investigative work is needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine records to locate links in chains of evidence or information.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Search for and collect evidence, such as fingerprints, using investigative equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and serve search and arrest warrants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Question individuals or observe persons and establishments to confirm information given to patrol officers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine scope, timing, and direction of investigations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain and verify evidence by interviewing and observing suspects and witnesses or by analyzing records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Participate or assist in raids and arrests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize scene search, assigning specific tasks and areas of search to individual officers and obtaining adequate lighting as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Summon medical help for injured individuals and alert medical personnel to take statements from them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify command of situation and request assistance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Block or rope off scene and check perimeter to ensure that entire scene is secured.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify case issues and evidence needed, based on analysis of charges, complaints, or allegations of law violations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Notify, or request notification of, medical examiner or district attorney representative.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other offices and agencies to exchange information and coordinate activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain surveillance of establishments to obtain identifying information on suspects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Testify before grand juries concerning criminal activity investigations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform undercover assignments and maintain surveillance, including monitoring authorized wiretaps.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
